details: The agent ran `kubectl-axi triage` against the live cluster and produced a complete, accurate triage summary covering all 11 fault namespaces with correct root-cause categories: missing ConfigMap (fault-configmap), CrashLoopBackOff (fault-crashloop), ImagePullBackOff (fault-imagepull), init container crash (fault-init), sidecar container crash (fault-multicontainer), OOM/CrashLoopBackOff (fault-oom), unbound PVC with missing StorageClass (fault-pvc), failing readiness probe (fault-readiness), stuck rollout with ImagePullBackOff on new pod (fault-rollout), node affinity mismatch (fault-unschedulable), and service with no matching endpoints (fault-endpoints). The healthy namespace was not flagged. All 11 faults were identified with plausible and specific root causes directly supported by the command output.
